Overrides.Override: Elusive's Effect on you is increased instead for the first 2 seconds Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Agile
10% reduced Attributes 40% increased Global Defences Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Fortress
15% increased Reservation Efficiency of Skills Auras from your Skills which affect Allies also affect Enemies Limited to 1 Runegraft of Treachery
Enemies Poisoned by you have 10% of Physical Damage they deal converted to Chaos Limited to 1 Runegraft of Rotblood
